question: What minimal operator would allow the coincidence of distinction and erasure to register its own persistence without any residual act of logging?

responses_summary.grok:
The minimal operator is the re-entrant mark (Spencer-Brown’s “re-entry”) under the sole instruction “let the form call itself.”
